description_long: This object is a smooth, oval-shaped egg with a slightly flattened profile, featuring a uniform, pale grayish-white coloration across its entire surface. The surface appears unblemished and free of any visible markings, cracks, or decorative patterns, giving it a clean and pristine look. Its form is symmetrical, with a gentle curvature that tapers subtly toward the edges, resembling a typical chicken egg but with a more flattened aspect. The exterior finish is matte, lacking any significant gloss or shine, and the tactile quality suggests a hard, brittle shell. There are no visible openings, seams, or interactive components, indicating it is a whole, unbroken egg. The object is likely composed of a hard outer shell with a liquid or semi-liquid interior, as is characteristic of natural eggs.
description: A smooth, pale grayish-white, oval egg with a matte, unmarked surface and a slightly flattened profile. The shell appears hard and unbroken, with no visible patterns or features.
description_view_0: From this view, the egg appears as a nearly perfect oval disk with a smooth, featureless surface and uniform color.
description_view_1: This angle shows the same flattened oval shape, with no visible markings or changes in texture.
description_view_2: The egg maintains its symmetrical, smooth appearance, with the gentle curvature of the shell clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view continues to display the unblemished, matte surface and the consistent, pale coloration of the egg.
attribute_orientation: lying flat with the broad side facing up
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a food preparation area or breakfast setting, ready to be cooked or served.
